column1: Data Figure 1.4: Data series on structural labour transformation 1800-2100 (SC scenario)
Sheet extracted from Planet Paper: Chanceletal2026Appendix_MacroScenarios.xlsx Sheet E0b
Assumptions: (1) Economic labour series: extracted from other sheets, see formulas

(2) Domestic labour for women and men: on the basis of time-use surveys, shares in total labour hours are assumed to be 30%-6% 1800, 31%-7% 1850-1860, 32%-8% 1910, 33%-9% 1960, 33%-11% 2025 (and 25%-25% in 2100)
